ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award category */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the award was won or not */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event (e.g., Oscar ceremony) */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizing body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES award_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the award category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the award category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES award_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity */,
  "entity_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the entity */,
  "entity_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the entity */,
  "entity_home_country" TEXT /* Home country of the entity */,
  "entity_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the entity's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award winner */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award won */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity that won the award */,
  "award_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the award */,
  "award_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award nominee */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award nominated for */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity that was nominated */,
  "nomination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the nomination */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date of the nomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_nominees_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_nominees_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_roles" (
  "entity_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity role */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role */,
  "role_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_roles_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "user_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's photo */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity recommended */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score for the recommendation */,
  "recommended_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_by FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rating */,
  "rated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the entity */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_rated_by FOREIGN KEY ("rated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award viewed */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity viewed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the view */,
  "viewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the award or entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_viewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("viewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
